notes: W011 is heuristic on `gh pr view`/external CLI handoff and persists regardless of mitigations. Severity is pinned to `high` to match the post-spec-36-baseline scanner reality on this branch (the same value spec 39 will commit on its branch); this PR's bump is the coordination half of a cross-PR cycle so PR #155 and PR #156 do not block each other on cspell/security-scan. Spec 39 (PR #156) ships the full Security model description for pr-comments and is the canonical owner of these notes. Severity is provisional: the local scanner was not run for this PR (`SNYK_TOKEN` not available; CI ran in skip mode per `evals/security/CLAUDE.md`). Maintainer to refresh with `bash evals/security/scan.sh --update-baselines --confirm` before merge per the `evals/security/CLAUDE.md` rule.
